title: Hello Kitty's Supercute Friendship Festival!
excerpt: On Thursday night, Cindy and I attended the launch party for Hello Kitty's Supercute Friendship Festival ! The first part of it took place at the Forum Club, and then moved into the actual Forum for the big event. We…
body:
On Thursday night, Cindy and I attended the launch party for Hello Kitty's Supercute Friendship Festival! The first part of it took place at the Forum Club, and then moved into the actual Forum for the big event. We were lucky enough to get a photo with the star herself on the red carpet! She is one busy and very popular girl.

It was a feast for all the senses and because I knew it would be worth recording, I put together this little video from the evening and also the next day when I was in the studio with all the goodies. Highlights for me were getting a tattoo (temporary - of course), seeing Chrissa Sparkles again, and meeting the Cakies crew! They might be the cutest family ever. I had no idea those bows were all hand-made either. Her tutorial is right here. And because her 9 year old daughter's wrap up is way better than mine, you can see the photos and read it here.

Hope you enjoy these vlog style videos and subscribe to my channel!
